name: Old World Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, sift together the cake flour, sugar, cocoa powder, instant coffee, and salt.
2. Add the vegetable shortening, 2/3 cup of the buttermilk, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining 1/3 cup of buttermilk and eggs until combined at medium speed, another 2 minutes.
4. Pour batter evenly into two greased 8-inch round cake pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow cakes to cool in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes.
7. Remove cakes from pans and let them cool completely on racks.
8. Place one cake layer onto a serving plate. Spread with sweetened whipped cream.
9. Top with second cake layer. Frost the entire cake with remaining sweetened whipped cream.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Sweetened Whipped Cream:
1. Chill mixing bowl and beaters in refrigerator.
2. In chilled bowl, combine cream, sugar, and vanilla. Beat with electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form and mixture is of a spreading consistency. Do not overbeat, as this will cause the mixture to become buttery.
